weekly picks (Jun 5 week 2026)

Posted on June 29, 2026 in 2026jun,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 June 5th week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

06/29

  1. 2606.27415v1 Elimination of Flux Trapping in Superconducting Circuits in Ambient Magnetic Fields (arXiv)

  2. 2606.27422v1 Magnetic long-range order at finite temperature in two-dimensional hyperbolic lattices (arXiv)

  3. 2606.27493v1 SU(4) Heisenberg model on the hyperhoneycomb lattice (arXiv)

  4. 2606.27512v1 Mapping the Growth of Two-Dimensional $\pi$-Conjugated Polymers on Au(111): Organometallic Intermediates and Edge Terminations (arXiv)

  6. 2606.27592v1 Thermal Corrections and Analysis on the Phase Stability of CsPbCl3 and Cs2AgSbCl6 during In-Situ Thermal Treatment (arXiv)

  7. 2606.27616v1 Emergence of millimeter-wave resonances in self-assembled ferroelectric metamaterials (arXiv)

  8. 2606.27621v1 Entropy engineering of BF-BT-based high-entropy ceramics for ultra-high energy storage performance (arXiv)

  9. 2606.27628v1 The Second Law, Symmetry of Time Reversal and Thermodynamic Equilibrium in Superconductors (arXiv)

  10. 2606.27636v1 CoTAR: Topology and Atomic State Reconstruction in Condensed Phases (arXiv)

  11. 2606.27639v1 Thickness dependence of diode efficiency in superconducting Fe(Se,Te)/FeTe thin-film heterostructure devices (arXiv)

  12. 2606.27673v1 Circularly Polarized Magneto-Photoluminescence in Two-Dimensional Chiral Perovskites R- and S-(C4H9NH3)2PbI4 under High Magnetic Fields (arXiv)

  14. 2606.27723v1 Vacancy-mediated nitrogen diffusion and aggregation via high-fluence electron beam irradiation in HPHT synthesized diamond crystal (arXiv)

  16. 2606.27768v1 Collision and coalescence dynamics of bosonic quantum Hall droplets (arXiv)

  17. 2606.27770v1 Confined exciton polaron in MoS$_2$ on twisted-hBN (arXiv)

  18. 2606.27788v1 Non-Newtonian two-dimensional electron fluid in magnetic field (arXiv)

  19. 2606.27809v1 Eigenvalue Statistics of Random Quantum Geometry (arXiv)

  20. 2606.27810v1 Exceptional Points as Manifestations of Topological-Charge Breakdown in a Non-Hermitian Skyrmion (arXiv)

  21. 2606.27830v1 Theory of Electron Spin Resonance Scanning Tunneling Microscopy: The First Decade (arXiv)

  22. 2606.27835v1 Rare Events Govern Defect Formation under Weak Symmetry Breaking (arXiv)

  25. 2606.27874v1 A stochastic model of a nuclear reactor with directed percolation. Overjump and maximum power (arXiv)

  26. 2606.27896v1 Symmetry-Selective Strain Control of Spin-Momentum Locking and Spin Transport in Two-Dimensional Pentagonal Altermagnets (arXiv)

  27. 2606.27963v1 Hidden valley dynamics behind vanishing circular polarization in moir'e excitons (arXiv)

  28. 2606.27985v1 Nonextensive Statistical Signatures of the Bilaterian Transition in Proteome Length Distributions (arXiv)

  29. 2606.27991v1 Competing spin-1 and spin-2 regimes in a frustrated four-leg spin-1/2 ladder (arXiv)

  30. 2606.28000v1 Ferrimagnetic and Haldane-type phases in a mixed-spin $1$-$\tfrac{1}{2}$-$\tfrac{1}{2}$ quantum trimer chain (arXiv)

  31. 2606.28056v1 Determining Electron Beam Lateral Coherence in a Scanning Electron Microscope Using Electron Diffraction (arXiv)

  32. 2606.28072v1 In situ synchrotron X-ray diffraction study of flash austenitization and process design insights in medium-Manganese steels for energy applications (arXiv)

  33. 2606.28073v1 Room-temperature magnon-phonon transduction in high-damping Co/Pt structures (arXiv)

  34. 2606.28082v1 Population-Dominated Ergotropy in a Capacitively Coupled Double-Quantum-Dot Battery under 1/f Charge Noise (arXiv)

  35. 2606.28093v1 Tuning the optoelectronic properties of wide bandgap perovskites: Data-driven insights from combinatorial synthesis and high-throughput experimentation (arXiv)

  36. 2606.28103v1 Phase structure of the Random Language Model (arXiv)

  37. 2606.28105v1 Scaling limit of the Random Language Model (arXiv)

  38. 2606.28155v1 Uniaxial compression of crystalline HCP titanium: an atomistic modelling study of size effects (arXiv)

  40. 2606.28189v1 Imaging geometry- and phase-controlled spectra in a surface-state Andreev cavity (arXiv)

  41. 2606.28205v1 Interlayer electric multipole Hall effect in twisted multilayers (arXiv)

  42. 2606.28240v1 Entropy density functional theory for inhomogeneous fluids (arXiv)

  43. 2606.28262v1 Classical versus quantum Anderson localization in disordered systems (arXiv)

  44. 2606.28298v1 Stationary point complexity via minimal supersymmetry breaking (arXiv)

  45. 2606.28306v1 Excitation of Collective Modes in a Chiral Superfluid by Thermal Quench (arXiv)

  46. 2606.09306v1 Range-controlled entanglement in Lindbladian skin states of monitored fermions (arXiv)

  53. 2606.27946v1 Heterogeneous synaptic motifs bridge microscale structure and macroscale nonlinear dynamics (arXiv)
